## Sales and production of fish and fisheries products

```{r}
#| label: fisheries production and sales table

# household df
fisheries_prod_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "fisheries_prod_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# proudct df
fisheries_prod_product_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "fisheries_prod_product_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::other_prod_sales(
  hhold_df = fisheries_prod_hhold_df,
  product_df = fisheries_prod_product_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  practice_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_prod_practice_var),
  practice_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_prod_practice_val),
  products_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_prod_products_var),
  sold_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_prod_sold_var),
  sold_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_prod_sold_val),
  amt_sold_vars = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_prod_amt_sold_var[[1]]),
  amt_sold_dk_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_prod_amt_sold_dk_val),
  group_var = "supervisor",
  table_title = "Fishery production and sales"
)
```
